career_resources.name: Handshake
career_resources.description: ASU's primary job and internship board. 200K+ employers. Filter by major, location, visa sponsorship.
career_resources.tip: Complete your profile to 100% — employers filter by profile completeness.

career_resources.name: Career & Internship Fairs
career_resources.description: Fulton Engineering, W.P. Carey Business, University-wide, and STEM-specific fairs each semester.
career_resources.tip: Register on Handshake 2 weeks before. Research attending employers. Bring 20+ resumes.

career_resources.name: 1-on-1 Career Coaching
career_resources.description: 30-min appointments with career coaches for resume review, interview prep, job search strategy.
career_resources.availability: Book via Handshake. Same-day walk-ins available MWF 1-4 PM.
career_resources.tip: Bring a draft resume and 2-3 target job postings to maximize the session.

career_resources.name: Sun Devil Career Network
career_resources.description: 600K+ ASU alumni worldwide. Mentorship matching, industry panels, and alumni referral program.
career_resources.tip: Search by industry and location on ASU Alumni Association portal. Many alumni actively mentor.
